steps.title: Use the triangle sum
steps.content: The interior angles of a triangle add to $180^\circ$. In triangle $PQR$, the other two angles each measure $41^\circ$.

steps.title: Subtract the known angles
steps.content:
Find the remaining angle measure.
$$P=180^\circ-41^\circ-41^\circ=98^\circ$$
The answer is 98.
